name: Lentiviral Functional Titer (Infectious Units/mL)
nameCn: 慢病毒功能性滴度测定（感染单位/mL）

components.name: 1. Day 0: Seed HEK293T or HeLa cells in 24-well plate

note.en: 1×10⁵ cells/well (HEK293T) or 0.5×10⁵ (HeLa). Cells should be 20–30% confluent at time of infection (exponential growth). Avoid antibiotics.
note.zh: HEK293T：每孔 1×10⁵；HeLa：0.5×10⁵。感染时细胞汇合度 20–30%（指数生长期）。不加抗生素。

components.name: 2. Day 1: Prepare serial dilutions of virus (10-fold series)

note.en: In complete medium: undiluted, 1:10, 1:100, 1:1,000, 1:10,000. Add polybrene (8 µg/mL final). Infect in duplicate wells per dilution. Total volume: 500 µL/well.
note.zh: 完全培养基中：原液、1:10、1:100、1:1,000、1:10,000。加 Polybrene（终浓度 8 µg/mL）。每稀释度双复孔感染。每孔总体积 500 µL。

note.en: Increases transduction efficiency 2–5×. Preferred for hard-to-infect cells.
note.zh: 感染效率提高 2–5 倍。推荐用于难感染细胞。

components.name: 4. Day 2 (24 h): replace medium with fresh complete medium (remove virus)

note.en: Remove virus-containing medium to reduce toxicity.
note.zh: 去除含病毒培养基以减少毒性。

components.name: 5. Day 4–5 (72–96 h post-transduction): harvest cells for analysis

note.en: GFP/reporter virus: analyze by flow cytometry. Antibiotic resistance: fix at 72 h, select with antibiotic for 7 days, count colonies.
note.zh: GFP/报告基因病毒：流式细胞仪分析。抗生素抗性：72 h 固定，抗生素筛选 7 天，克隆计数。

note.en: Count % GFP+ cells (FITC channel). Gate on live cells (FSC/SSC + DAPI-). Use dilutions where 1–20% cells are GFP+ (linear range, MOI ≤0.2 ensures single integration).
note.zh: 计数 GFP+ 细胞百分比（FITC 通道）。门控活细胞（FSC/SSC + DAPI-）。使用 1–20% GFP+ 的稀释度（线性范围，MOI ≤0.2 确保单次整合）。

note.en: IU/mL = (% GFP+ / 100) × total cell count × dilution factor / volume infected (mL). Example: 10% GFP+, 10⁵ cells, 1:1,000 dilution, 0.5 mL → (0.10 × 10⁵ × 1,000) / 0.5 = 2×10⁷ IU/mL.

notes.en: Functional titer reports true infectious units (transducing units, TU). More accurate than p24 ELISA for biological experiments. Use MOI ≤0.2 for titer calculation (Poisson distribution: ensures single integration events). For non-GFP vectors, use qPCR-based titer: measure proviral DNA copies per cell at 72 h post-transduction.
notes.zh: 功能性滴度报告真实感染单位（转导单位，TU）。生物学实验比 p24 ELISA 更准确。计算滴度时 MOI ≤0.2（泊松分布确保单次整合事件）。非 GFP 载体可用 qPCR 法：72 h 后测每个细胞中病毒 DNA 拷贝数。

ref: Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505; Geraerts et al. (2006) Gene Ther 13:1294–1299; Salmon & Trono (2006) Curr Protoc Hum Genet 12.10.1

usage.en: Determine functional lentiviral titer by serial dilution and colony counting or antibiotic selection.
usage.zh: 连续稀释法通过菌落计数或抗生素筛选测定慢病毒功能性滴度。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 无需存储

note.en: After seeding cells (Day 0), cells attach overnight — natural stopping point
note.zh: 接种细胞后（第 0 天），细胞过夜贴壁 — 自然停止点

note.en: After medium change (Day 2), wait 48–72 h for reporter expression before analysis
note.zh: 换液后（第 2 天），等待 48–72 h 报告基因表达后再分析

detailedSteps.en: Seed HEK293T (1×10⁵/well) or HeLa (0.5×10⁵/well) in 24-well plate with 500 µL complete DMEM. Cells should be 20–30% confluent at time of infection. Do not add antibiotics
detailedSteps.zh: 在 24 孔板中接种 HEK293T（1×10⁵/孔）或 HeLa（0.5×10⁵/孔），500 µL 完全 DMEM。感染时细胞汇合度应为 20–30%。不加抗生素

detailedSteps.en: Incubate overnight at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for cell attachment
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 过夜孵育使细胞贴壁

detailedSteps.en: Prepare 10-fold serial dilutions of viral supernatant in complete medium: undiluted, 1:10, 1:100, 1:1,000, 1:10,000. Add polybrene to 8 µg/mL final concentration
detailedSteps.zh: 用完全培养基配制 10 倍梯度稀释的病毒上清：原液、1:10、1:100、1:1,000、1:10,000。加入 Polybrene 至终浓度 8 µg/mL

detailedSteps.en: Replace medium with 500 µL virus dilution per well (duplicate wells per dilution). Include uninfected control wells
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔换 500 µL 病毒稀释液（每个稀释度双复孔）。设未感染对照孔

detailedSteps.en: Optional: spinoculation at 800×g, 30 min at RT to enhance transduction 2–5×
detailedSteps.zh: 可选：800×g 室温离心 30 min 以增强转导效率 2–5 倍

detailedSteps.en: Remove virus-containing medium. Replace with 500 µL fresh complete DMEM (no polybrene) to reduce cytotoxicity
detailedSteps.zh: 去除含病毒培养基。换 500 µL 新鲜完全 DMEM（不加 Polybrene）以减少细胞毒性

detailedSteps.en: Trypsinize cells and resuspend in FACS buffer. For GFP/fluorescent reporters: analyze by flow cytometry (FITC channel). Gate on live cells (FSC/SSC + DAPI⁻)
detailedSteps.zh: 胰酶消化细胞并用 FACS 缓冲液重悬。GFP/荧光报告基因：流式细胞仪分析（FITC 通道）。门控活细胞（FSC/SSC + DAPI⁻）

detailedSteps.en: Use dilutions where 1–20% of cells are GFP⁺ (linear range, MOI ≤0.2 ensures single integration events per Poisson distribution)
detailedSteps.zh: 选择 1–20% GFP⁺ 的稀释度（线性范围，MOI ≤0.2 确保泊松分布下的单次整合事件）

detailedSteps.en: Calculate titer: IU/mL = (% GFP⁺ / 100) × total cell count × dilution factor / volume infected (mL). Report average of duplicate wells
detailedSteps.zh: 计算滴度：IU/mL = (% GFP⁺ / 100) × 细胞总数 × 稀释倍数 / 感染体积 (mL)。报告双复孔的平均值

briefSteps.en: Seed cells (Day 0) → serial dilution + polybrene transduction (Day 1) → medium change (Day 2) → flow cytometry for GFP⁺ % (Day 4–5) → calculate IU/mL
briefSteps.zh: 接种细胞（第 0 天）→ 梯度稀释 + Polybrene 转导（第 1 天）→ 换液（第 2 天）→ 流式检测 GFP⁺ %（第 4–5 天）→ 计算 IU/mL
